hero.title: Dream.OS — An Operating System for Building
hero.subhero: Building an organization that can build things — not just interesting projects.
hero.description: Governed venture studio stack: centralized authority, proof-backed surfaces, and portfolio domains wired through mission control.
hero.current_focus: Investor-facing proof surfaces, revenue activation, and modular product delivery.

portfolio_network.title: Portfolio Network
portfolio_network.subtitle: Dream.OS venture studio — linked domains under one operating system

root.name: Dream.OS
root.role: Governance spine, planner authority, and runtime

proof_layer.title: Proof Layer
proof_layer.description: Every lane ships with evidence. Session closeouts publish to Discord, sync portfolio surfaces, and land in the feed as auditable history — not vanity demos.

capabilities: Governance enforcement live — closeout gates block incomplete work
Planner as task authority — active queue + NEXT_LANE routing
Portfolio surfaces auto-sync from proof artifacts
themes: System, not collection — authority centralized, governance enforced
Modular architecture — separated concerns across domains and toolbelt
Leverage layers — systems that build features, not one-off builds
